title: Meta’s AI Ambitions Keep Expanding. Is META Stock Keeping Up?
excerpt: Meta crushed earnings five quarters running yet the stock has gone nowhere, and a $145 billion capex bet is the reason investors are split. Whether that spen...
content_html:
Vandita Jadeja

Mon, July 20, 2026 at 11:30 AM EDT 4 min read

Quick Read

  • META rates a BUY at $893 with 38% upside after shares dropped 8% despite Q1 EPS crushing consensus by 57%.

  • Alphabet guides $175-185B in 2026 capex versus Meta's $145B, while Pinterest's 631 million MAUs highlight Meta's dominant scale advantage.

  • Reality Labs bled $4 billion in Q1 operating losses, yet even the bear case projects META reaching $765, which would represent an 18% gain.

  • Act now: the analyst who called NVIDIA in 2010 just named his top 10 AI stocks — and Meta didn't make the cut. Grab the names FREE today.

Meta has become the poster child for the hyperscaler AI spending race. 2026 has been a tug of war between blockbuster earnings and rising anxiety about capex translation into shareholder returns. Our proprietary model sees material upside from here.

Our 24/7 Wall St. price target for Meta Platforms (NASDAQ: META) is $892.70 over the next 12 months, implying 38.19% upside from $646.01. The recommendation is a buy with high confidence (90%).

24/7 Wall St. Price Target Summary

Why META Has Traded Sideways Despite a Blowout Quarter

Meta is down 1.96% year to date and 7.6% over the past year, sitting 4% below its 52-week high of $793.65.

Q1 2026 delivered revenue of $56.31 billion growing 33.08% year over year and EPS of $10.44 beating consensus by 56.79%, the fifth straight beat. Yet shares fell 8.55% as investors digested a raised full-year capex range of $125 to $145 billion.

A Benzinga report flagged a potential $10 billion AI deal with Anthropic, and JPMorgan described Meta's aggressive Model API pricing as "the first significant step toward monetizing its substantial AI investments beyond advertising."

Act now: the analyst who called NVIDIA in 2010 just named his top 10 AI stocks — and Meta didn't make the cut. Grab the names FREE today.

The Case for $1,015 and Higher

Bulls argue advertising funds AI expansion. Q1 ad impressions rose 19% YoY and price per ad rose 12%, with Family of Apps daily active people at 3.56 billion. Zuckerberg framed the strategy plainly: "Our biggest milestone so far this year has been the release of our Muse family of models."

UBS carries a Buy with a $766 target, and analyst coverage skews 57 Buy ratings versus 6 Holds and zero Sells. Our bull case pegs META at $1,015.75, a 57.23% return.

What Could Go Wrong

The bear case centers on capex return on investment. FY25 capex hit $72.22 billion and 2026 guidance stretches to $145 billion. Reality Labs continues to bleed with a $4.03 billion Q1 operating loss. Regulatory overhang includes 2026 youth-related trials that could produce material judgments.

content_html_zh:
万迪塔·贾德贾

2026 年 7 月 20 日星期一，美国东部时间上午 11:30 阅读 4 分钟

快速阅读

  • 尽管第一季度每股收益超出共识 57%，但股价仍下跌 8%，META 给予买入评级为 893 美元，上涨空间为 38%。
  • Alphabet 预计 2026 年资本支出为 175-185 亿美元，而 Meta 为 145 亿美元，而 Pinterest 的 6.31 亿月活跃用户凸显了 Meta 的主导规模优势。
  • Reality Labs 第一季度运营亏损达 40 亿美元，但即使是悲观假设，META 也预计将达到 765 美元，这意味着增长 18%。
  • 立即行动：2010 年致电 NVIDIA 的分析师刚刚列出了他心目中的十大人工智能股票，而 Meta 并未上榜。 今天免费获取名字。

Meta 已成为超大规模人工智能消费竞赛的典型代表。 2026 年是一场拉锯战，一方面是巨额盈利，另一方面是对资本支出转化为股东回报的日益担忧。 我们的专有模型从这里看到了材料的优势。

我们对 Meta Platforms（纳斯达克股票代码：META）未来 12 个月的 24/7 华尔街目标价为 892.70 美元，较 646.01 美元上涨 38.19%。 建议以高置信度 (90%) 购买。

24/7 华尔街价格目标摘要

为什么 META 在季度井喷的情况下仍横盘整理

Meta 今年迄今下跌 1.96%，较去年下跌 7.6%，较 52 周高点 793.65 美元下跌 4%。

2026 年第一季度营收为 563.1 亿美元，同比增长 33.08%，每股收益为 10.44 美元，超出预期 56.79%，连续第五次超出预期。 然而，由于投资者消化了 125 至 1,450 亿美元的全年资本支出范围，股价下跌 8.55%。

Benzinga 的一份报告指出，与 Anthropic 可能达成 100 亿美元的 AI 交易，摩根大通将 Meta 激进的 Model API 定价描述为“将其在广告之外的大量 AI 投资货币化的重要第一步”。

立即行动：2010 年致电 NVIDIA 的分析师刚刚列出了他心目中的十大人工智能股票，而 Meta 并未上榜。 今天免费获取名字。

售价 1,015 美元及以上的保护壳

看涨者认为广告为人工智能的扩张提供了资金。 第一季度广告展示次数同比增长 19%，每个广告价格增长 12%，应用程序家族日活跃人数达到 35.6 亿。 扎克伯格明确地阐述了这一战略：“今年迄今为止我们最大的里程碑是发布了 Muse 系列机型。”

瑞银给予“买入”评级，目标价为 766 美元，分析师的评级为“买入”57 个，“持有”6 个，“卖出”0 个。 我们的牛市预测 META 价格为 1,015.75 美元，回报率为 57.23%。

可能会出现什么问题

悲观案例的重点是资本支出投资回报率。 2025 财年资本支出达到 722.2 亿美元，2026 年指引将达到 1,450 亿美元。 Reality Labs 继续亏损，第一季度运营亏损 40.3 亿美元。 监管悬而未决的问题包括 2026 年与青年相关的试验，这些试验可能会产生重大判断。
